title: Left Hand Trick
description: This makes it so locally you see your right hand, but other people see your main hand left hand. (if set left) If set main hand right, it looks left.
body:
# Difference
![Difference](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2254d171c92a600be1b5a7f8ea95c851cad43024.png)

# Left Hand Trick
A simple client-side mod that automatically fixes hand positioning for left-handed players in Minecraft.

# What does it do?
If you've ever set your main hand to "Left" in Minecraft's settings, you know the frustration - your main hand appears on the left side of the screen while most players are used to seeing it on the right. This mod fixes that!

# Features
Automatic Hand Swapping: When you select "Left" as your main hand in settings, this mod automatically swaps the visual positions so your main hand appears on the right side of the screen (just like right-handed mode)
Smart Detection: Only activates when main hand is set to "Left" - if you're already using right-handed mode, nothing changes
Client-Side Only: Works on any server, no server-side installation required
Seamless Experience: Maintains proper animations for swinging, equipping, and all hand movements
# Perfect for:
idk if you want to look cool, but not used to left hand

---
